commands.review_summary:
The PR lazily republishes freshly loaded plugin metadata snapshots into the Gateway current-snapshot slot on cold-slot model normalization, adds regression coverage plus a real-runtime proof script, and records the change in the changelog/generated SDK baseline metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main clears the current snapshot on persisted index writes and then the model-normalization fallback loads a fresh snapshot without republishing it. The PR body also supplies a real-runtime harness output showing the cold-slot disk-open pattern before the fix and zero additional installs.json opens after the slot is warmed.
commands.review_followup: No cleanup close or repair-lane action is appropriate; this is an active implementation PR that should proceed through normal maintainer review and validation.
